assertions.reason: mission-planner skill contains all seven planning phases with detailed instructions for codebase investigation and artifact generation.
evidence: Phase headings present include Understand Requirements, Investigate Codebase, Identify Milestones, Confirm Milestones, Plan Infrastructure, Plan Testing, and Generate Artifacts.
Phase 1 and 2 explicitly mention read_file, grep_search, and list_directory usage.

assertions.reason: mission-planner specifies VAL-XXX-NNN style assertions with behavioral descriptions and evidence requirements.
evidence: Skill includes regex-compatible example IDs such as VAL-AUTH-001 and VAL-API-002.
Section 7.1 describes validation-contract.md generation with behavioral descriptions, pass/fail criteria, and evidence requirements.

assertions.reason: mission-planner requires features.json entries to include fulfills arrays and enforces coverage gate ownership for each VAL assertion.
evidence: Section 7.2 defines features.json entries containing fulfills arrays.
Coverage Gate section requires every VAL-XXX-NNN assertion to appear in exactly one feature fulfills array.

assertions.reason: mission-planner instructs creation of the .mission/ directory with services.yaml, init.sh, library files, and skills directories.
evidence: Section 7.6 lists .mission/library/architecture.md, environment.md, and user-testing.md plus .mission/skills/.

assertions.reason: mission-planner includes explicit DAG acyclicity validation instructions before finalizing feature preconditions.
evidence: DAG Acyclicity Check section requires topological sorting/Kahn-style validation over feature preconditions.
The skill says never proceed with a cyclic dependency graph.

assertions.reason: mission-planner explicitly requires clarifying questions for vague or minimal project descriptions.
evidence: Phase 1 section Handling Vague or Minimal Descriptions says to ask clarifying questions before proceeding.
The skill forbids generating a plan from insufficient context.

assertions.reason: mission-planner instructs transitioning state.json from planning to orchestrator_turn and updating totalFeatures.
evidence: Section 7.7 is titled State Transition: planning → orchestrator_turn.
Procedure includes setting state to orchestrator_turn and totalFeatures to the number of generated features.

assertions.reason: mission-planner specifies initializing validation-state.json with every assertion ID in pending status.
evidence: Section 7.3 is dedicated to initializing validation-state.json.
The example JSON sets each VAL assertion to status pending.

frictions: A direct Task invocation for this assertion group exited early with a permissions-safety error, so equivalent CLI/file-surface validation was performed directly by the validator and recorded here.
The repository root does not include README.md; GEMINI.md and mission guidance served as the equivalent top-level context source.
